pi_items.source: Manual verification of eQUEST setup scripts and data folder showing that 4StoreyBuilding.inp exists and is normally imported to this path.
Grep of 4StoreyBuilding.inp file showing the actual Ground Floor system names are G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, and G.C15.
Verified against the explicit task description instructions and verifier.py logic.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for equest_env ground_floor_fan_shop_drawing_update task by verifying the eQUEST 4StoreyBuilding.inp data file. Discovered that the target system names claimed in the metadata (G.S1, G.E2, G.N3, G.W4, G.C5) explicitly contradict the actual system names in the model (G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, G.C15). Additionally, discovered a critical defect: both 'setup_task.ps1' and 'export_result.ps1' are entirely missing from the environment, making the task impossible to initialize automatically and programmatically unscorable.
